definitions.text: ISO 639-2 ISO 639-5 language code for Himachali languages.

A masculine pronoun; he as a grammatical object. With dative effect or as an indirect object. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller} Following a preposition. With accusative effect or as a direct object.
With dative effect or as an indirect object. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}

examples: I think this bird is a him, but it may be a her.
